members.name: GetBlendShape
members.summary: Returns the requested face blend shape weight.

members.name: SetBlendShape
members.signature: public void SetBlendShape(int blendShape, float weight)
members.summary: Sets a face blend shape weight.

members.name: BlendShapes
members.summary: The array of face blend shape weights with indices corresponding to the [enum BlendShapeEntry] enum.

values.name: FT_BROW_DOWN
values.summary: Pulls both eyebrows down and in.

values.name: FT_BROW_DOWN_LEFT
values.summary: Pulls the left eyebrow down and in.

values.name: FT_BROW_DOWN_RIGHT
values.summary: Pulls the right eyebrow down and in.

values.name: FT_CHEEK_SUCK_LEFT
values.summary: Sucks in the left side cheek.

values.name: FT_CHEEK_SUCK_RIGHT
values.summary: Sucks in the right side cheek.

values.name: FT_EYE_SQUINT_LEFT
values.summary: Squeezes the left eye socket muscles.

values.name: FT_EYE_SQUINT_RIGHT
values.summary: Squeezes the right eye socket muscles.

values.name: FT_LIP_FUNNEL_LOWER_LEFT
values.summary: Lower left lip part pushes into a funnel.

values.name: FT_LIP_FUNNEL_LOWER_RIGHT
values.summary: Lower right lip part pushes into a funnel.

values.name: FT_LIP_FUNNEL_UPPER_LEFT
values.summary: Upper left lip part pushes into a funnel.

values.name: FT_LIP_FUNNEL_UPPER_RIGHT
values.summary: Upper right lip part pushes into a funnel.

values.name: FT_LIP_PUCKER_LOWER_LEFT
values.summary: Lower left lip part pushes outwards.

values.name: FT_LIP_PUCKER_LOWER_RIGHT
values.summary: Lower right lip part pushes outwards.

values.name: FT_LIP_PUCKER_UPPER_LEFT
values.summary: Upper left lip part pushes outwards.

values.name: FT_LIP_PUCKER_UPPER_RIGHT
values.summary: Upper right lip part pushes outwards.

values.name: FT_LIP_SUCK_CORNER_LEFT
values.summary: Left lip corner folds into the mouth.

values.name: FT_LIP_SUCK_CORNER_RIGHT
values.summary: Right lip corner folds into the mouth.

values.name: FT_LIP_SUCK_LOWER_LEFT
values.summary: Lower left lip part tucks in the mouth.

values.name: FT_LIP_SUCK_LOWER_RIGHT
values.summary: Lower right lip part tucks in the mouth.

values.name: FT_LIP_SUCK_UPPER_LEFT
values.summary: Upper left lip part tucks in the mouth.

values.name: FT_LIP_SUCK_UPPER_RIGHT
values.summary: Upper right lip part tucks in the mouth.

values.name: FT_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum BlendShapeEntry] enum.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_CORNER_PULL_LEFT
values.summary: Left lip corner pulls diagonally up and out.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_CORNER_PULL_RIGHT
values.summary: Right lip corner pulls diagonally up and out.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_DIMPLE_LEFT
values.summary: Left lip corner is pushed backwards.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_DIMPLE_RIGHT
values.summary: Right lip corner is pushed backwards.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_LOWER_DOWN_LEFT
values.summary: Lower left part of the lip pulls up.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_LOWER_DOWN_RIGHT
values.summary: Lower right part of the lip pulls up.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_PRESS_LEFT
values.summary: Left side lips press and flatten together vertically.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_PRESS_RIGHT
values.summary: Right side lips press and flatten together vertically.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_RAISER_LOWER
values.summary: Raises and slightly pushes out the lower mouth.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_RAISER_UPPER
values.summary: Raises and slightly pushes out the upper mouth.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_SAD_LEFT
values.summary: Left side of the mouth expresses sadness.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_SAD_RIGHT
values.summary: Right side of the mouth expresses sadness.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_SMILE_LEFT
values.summary: Left side of the mouth smiles.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_SMILE_RIGHT
values.summary: Right side of the mouth smiles.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_STRETCH_LEFT
values.summary: Mouth corner lip pulls out and down.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_STRETCH_RIGHT
values.summary: Mouth corner lip pulls out and down.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_TIGHTENER_LEFT
values.summary: Left side lips squeeze together horizontally.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_TIGHTENER_RIGHT
values.summary: Right side lips squeeze together horizontally.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_UPPER_DEEPEN_LEFT
values.summary: Upper left lip part pushes in the cheek.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_UPPER_DEEPEN_RIGHT
values.summary: Upper right lip part pushes in the cheek.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_UPPER_UP_LEFT
values.summary: Upper left part of the lip pulls up.

values.name: FT_MOUTH_UPPER_UP_RIGHT
values.summary: Upper right part of the lip pulls up.

values.name: FT_TONGUE_BLEND_DOWN
values.summary: Tongue arches up then down inside the mouth.

values.name: FT_TONGUE_CURL_UP
values.summary: Tongue arches down then up inside the mouth.

values.name: FT_TONGUE_OUT
values.summary: Tongue visibly sticks out of the mouth.

values.name: FT_TONGUE_ROLL
values.summary: Sides of the tongue funnel, creating a roll.

values.name: FT_TONGUE_TWIST_LEFT
values.summary: Tongue tip rotates counter-clockwise, with the rest following gradually.

values.name: FT_TONGUE_TWIST_RIGHT
values.summary: Tongue tip rotates clockwise, with the rest following gradually.
